# QC-01: Specification Validation

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Confirm the incoming change request has been correctly captured with complete acceptance criteria, non-functional requirements (NFRs), and measurable success conditions. Reject incomplete specifications before any design work begins.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 1 | Intent Ingestion | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent drafts, human approves |
| **Agent does** | Parse incoming request, generate structured specification, identify gaps in acceptance criteria or NFRs. |
| **Human does** | Review draft specification; approve or reject; resolve identified gaps before sign-off. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Incoming change request | Raw change request from stakeholder (ticket, brief, or natural language intent). |  |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Validated feature specification | artefact | Structured FEAT-XXXX specification file conforming to schema/feature-spec.schema.json. | Lifecycle of the change + 7 years |
| Specification validation evidence | evidence | Checklist confirming all required fields are present and complete. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Product Owner |

Specification is returned to requester with identified gaps. Stage 1 cannot progress until all gaps are resolved.

## Dependencies

None

## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8 | ICT risk management requires documented change procedures with complete specifications |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Product / Delivery · **Owner role:** Product Owner
